title: Software Update - DFU - Turn off the device before starting DFU
scenario: Device Firmware Update fails with "Update currently not available" popup when device is turned off before starting the update
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that has an available firmware update.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update.
4. Tap Update to begin the firmware update process.
5. Turn off the Bluetooth audio device (e.g., press and hold the Power button).
7. Tap Continue and then Start Update.
expected: Step 6: App remains on the \"Software Update\" screen; nothing happens. Step 8: A popup appears with the message \"Update currently not available, please try back later\". Step 9: The popup closes and the user is returned to the \"Three Easy Steps\" screen.
